metadata.description: Agent-building practices from Anthropic's engineering blog, packaged as installable Claude Code components.

plugins.name: agent-stdlib
plugins.description: Skills distilled from Anthropic's engineering blog: building evals, calibrating eval infrastructure, coding-agent tool design, durable agent architecture, sandboxing, the think step, multi-agent orchestration, and parallel autonomous agents, plus MCP servers and a tool-gating hook.
